title: Optimized ERC20 transfer with inline assembly
trigger_patterns: balance update from sender to receiver
explanation: Five techniques combined: (1) custom 4-byte error selector avoids string storage, (2) scratch space 0x00-0x2b used for keccak256 slot computation avoiding memory expansion, (3) slot seed packing mixes address into seed for collision-free slot derivation, (4) log3 emits Transfer event without ABI encoding overhead, (5) fromBalance is sload-ed once and reused for both the check and the sstore.
when_to_apply: Any ERC20 transfer implementation using mapping-based balances
when_not_to_apply: Contracts with custom balance logic, rebasing tokens, tokens with transfer hooks that modify balances
